scripts.setup:legacy: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && node scripts/bootstrap-local.js
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build
